scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/*.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest tests/test_asset_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_analyzer.py tests/test_comfy_png_metadata.py tests/test_comic_png_metadata_v2.py -v && node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs
scripts.test:recovery: python3 -m unittest tests/test_asset_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_analyzer.py tests/test_comfy_png_metadata.py tests/test_comic_png_metadata_v2.py -v
